overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through Night City at dusk. The scene features neon-lit streets, holographic billboards, futuristic architecture, and moderate pedestrian activity throughout the urban environment.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic urban intersection with pedestrian crosswalk

events.description: steps onto the yellow striped crosswalk and begins crossing the street
completes crossing the street and steps onto the opposite sidewalk

agents.ego_description: walking across the broad yellow crosswalk at a futuristic city intersection

notable_agents.action: futuristic car driving down the street in the distance

entered.detail: large digital billboard displaying health warning text in bright white letters
broad pedestrian crossing with bold yellow stripes
dark building facade with multiple glowing advertisement displays

segments.scene_description: The segment opens at a futuristic urban intersection at dusk, with a large health warning billboard visible ahead. The character crosses the broad yellow-striped crosswalk while sparse pedestrian and vehicle traffic moves through the area. The environment features dark buildings with illuminated poster displays and an overpass structure visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: neon-lit commercial sidewalk with storefronts and vending machines

events.description: passing beneath bright green neon signage increases local illumination

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the orange-tiled sidewalk past various shops and illuminated signs

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in red plaid shirt walking ahead on the sidewalk

entered.detail: green neon sign reading CHILL mounted above a doorway
row of illuminated vending machines with various product advertisements
elevated highway or monorail structure spanning across the street ahead

segments.scene_description: Walking along the orange-paved sidewalk, the character passes beneath a bright green CHILL neon sign and rows of illuminated vending machines. The overpass structure looms ahead while the health warning billboard recedes behind. Sparse pedestrians walk in the same direction along this commercial corridor.

scene_state.functional_zone: major commercial thoroughfare with large digital billboards and overpass

events.description: approaching the large Speed Lords billboard and intersection area
futuristic vehicles pass through the intersection ahead

agents.ego_description: continuing down the sidewalk approaching a major intersection with prominent advertising displays

notable_agents.action: red futuristic sports car stopped at the intersection traffic light

entered.detail: massive digital billboard displaying red sports car with SPEED LORDS text and 31.1% interest rate
towering futuristic skyscraper with illuminated windows rising above the street
tall modern street lamp with multiple light fixtures

segments.scene_description: The character approaches a major intersection dominated by a massive Speed Lords billboard featuring a red sports car. The overpass structure draws closer while futuristic vehicles navigate the intersection. The crowd density increases slightly as the character walks past palm trees and street lights along the broad thoroughfare.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense urban corridor with holographic advertisements and elevated structures

events.description: slight adjustment to navigate around pedestrians on the crowded sidewalk

agents.ego_description: walking through a denser commercial section with increased pedestrian activity and towering advertisements

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in white shirt walking ahead on the sidewalk

entered.detail: tall structure displaying multiple layered holographic advertisements and brand imagery
tropical palm tree planted on the sidewalk near the building facade
storefront with bright interior lighting and visible merchandise displays

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the character walking through a denser urban corridor with holographic advertisements towering overhead. The overpass structure now appears to the left while palm trees and commercial shops line the sidewalk. The crowd density remains moderate as the character continues through the neon-lit cityscape.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a neon-lit urban district that evolves from a sparse intersection into a dense, holographic commercial corridor. It begins by crossing a broad yellow-striped crosswalk beneath a large health warning billboard, moving past dark buildings and toward a distant overpass. As the camera advances along an orange-paved sidewalk, the scene shifts past a bright green CHILL neon sign and rows of glowing vending machines while the initial billboard recedes. The perspective then opens into a major intersection dominated by a massive Speed Lords billboard and futuristic vehicles, with the overpass drawing closer as the character passes palm trees and increasing crowds. Finally, the environment transitions into a denser urban stretch where towering holographic advertisements loom overhead and the overpass shifts to the left, leaving the character immersed in a vibrant, shop-lined cityscape.
